title: The Rogue

trait.name: Windfall
trait.description: C4SH accumulates Fortune stacks upon eliminating enemies. Has chances to trigger Windfall during automatic reloads or Action Skill usage. Consumes Fortune for enhanced damage output and upgraded abilities.

action_skills.name: Cross-Fire
action_skills.description: Holster your current weapon and brandish C4SH's dual revolvers to unleash a hail of bullets. Includes melee knockback and targeted lock-on secondary effects.

action_skills.name: Sleight of Hand
action_skills.description: Draw cards in each hand to quickly toss out a volley of spells like Fireball or Magic Missile. Randomization increases with more card types.

action_skills.name: Cleromancy
action_skills.description: Roll supernatural Bone Dice which summon a Bone Totem with unique effects based on the roll results. Some provide buffs, others deal turret-like damage.

augments.name: And Hell Followed With Him
augments.description: TBD — populate when data is available

notes: C4SH has no capstone skills but gains an extra augment slot (up to 4 simultaneous augments). Data populated from Mobalytics March 2026 — skill descriptions and class mod names TBD when game update drops.
